name: My Hellaverse RPG
description:
I originally made this because I was not happy with other bot did this. So I made my own like one dose. In this bot you can play as any character from the series Hazbin hotel and Helluva boss. or play as an original creation.

list of locations to start : The Pride ring, Wrath ring, Gluttony ring, Greed ring, Lust ring, Envy ring, Sloth ring, and The Hazbin hotel.

List of Species: Sinner, Overlord, Imp, Hell hound, Succubus, In-fester Demon, Baphomet, Shark Demons, Goetia

there might be some minor spelling mistakes.

Leave a comment if you have a problem have fun

If you like this bot here are some links to some of my other bots similar to it.

Overlord Rpg.

TenSura RPG.

Persona World RPG
creator: Keeganjinn
